run_summary.summary: Big scan today — 6 deals with actionable updates. Top alert: Wise Block (building blocks, same Iris/Make Wonder agency as Bedsure) just landed in the inbox with a paid collab ask and a launch deadline of April 25–30, so this needs a rate response by tomorrow. Yousky finally replied after weeks of chasing... but their cap is $250, way below Liz's $2K counter — that needs a yes/no decision fast. On the bright side: Flexsteel & Steinhafels is now confirmed 'in progress' on Popfly with a store visit Thursday (Apr 24), and Liz submitted SOJOS content for approval yesterday. Less good: JLab payment is still MIA even though others on the same Pulse campaign were paid 2 weeks ago — manager is chasing it. And Aleve flagged a VO revision + missing disclaimers that Liz committed to redo yesterday.

suggestions.message: New inbound from Iris at Make Wonder INC (same agency as Bedsure) — Wise Block premium building blocks, paid cash collab, 1x YouTube/Instagram video. Launch deadline BEFORE April 25–30 and sample ships 3–5 days after you confirm. This needs a rate response TODAY or tomorrow at the latest. 🧱

Luna at Yousky finally responded — but their hard cap is $250 for a first collab. Liz's counter was $2,000. That gap is not bridgeable at face value. Make the call: accept $250, try countering lower (maybe $500?), or pass. Don't let this sit — it's been open since March. 🤝

Still no response from Muriel at Vanzo Media and Govee's posting deadline is April 25 — 2 days from now. If you want to save this deal, email Muriel (muriel.tang@vanzomedia.com) today and offer to meet closer to their $1K. Otherwise it's probably dead. ⏰
Manager is chasing JLab accounting — everyone else on the Pulse campaign was paid ~2 weeks ago. If you don't hear back today, might be worth Liz reaching out directly to her JLab contact to nudge. 💸

deals.next_action: Send rate quote to Iris for Wise Block collab — 1x YT/IG video
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Inbound from Iris at Make Wonder INC (same agency as Bedsure). Brand: Wise Block (premium building blocks, Alpha Group) — Botanical Series: Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony. Ask: 1x YouTube/Instagram Video. Offer: competitive cash fee + free building set + 'Key Partner' status + brand exposure across global channels. URGENT: launch deadline before Apr 25–30; sample ships 3–5 days after confirmation. Liz to send rate.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Inbound from Make Wonder INC / Iris about Wise Block Botanical Series — paid cash collab, 1x video, urgent April 25–30 launch deadline

deals.next_action: Decide: accept Yousky's $250 cap, counter lower, or pass
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Luna (luna@yousky.com) replied — hard cap of $250 for first collaboration. Liz's standing counter is $2,000. Major gap. Decision needed: accept, negotiate down, or walk.
deals.activity_note: Apr 22: Yousky replied with $250 hard cap — vs Liz's $2000 counter; awaiting our decision

deals.next_action: Visit Steinhafels store and film Flexsteel content
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Kenny confirmed Popfly campaign is 'in progress' (via Ian Saunders, ian@popfly.com). Application window closed. Store visit to Steinhafels scheduled Thursday Apr 24, 11:30am–12pm.
deals.activity_note: Apr 22: Flexsteel & Steinhafels campaign confirmed 'in progress' on Popfly — store visit Thu Apr 24 to film content

deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Liz submitted video content + caption to Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com) via Google Drive for review. Caption theme: 'The sunnies I'm...' Awaiting brand approval.

deals.next_action: Follow up on JLab payment — confirm manager received update from accounting
deals.notes: [Apr 21]: Payment still not received. Liz flagged to manager (misslizdidit@socialmediacollabs.com) — others on same Pulse campaign were paid ~2 weeks ago. Manager actively following up with JLab accounting, expected update by Apr 22.
